transcript.clean_text: foreign running out for those wishing to make an impact on this year's Welter celebrations still ringing in the ears for EF education easy post now for a hugely popular win by rigoberto Iran on stage 17. maintains his lead an unchanged margin over enrich mass of two minutes and one second with the Uso Rodriguez Miguel Anga Lopez rounding out the top five well today's run destination pure now double time around the same climb but from a different entry to it I was always going to Garner a breakaway mainly because there was rolling terrain before we got to the mountains at the end of the day it could be huge the favorites were gathering and we knew that it'd be Pacey at the start bring about to Iran well his back must have been sore for the Mirage of riders that came and patted him wishing him congratulations While others looking jealously at Rigoberto's result would give it a go today we were destined to have an enormous Breakaway the biggest of the race so far stage 18 then Alto de Pio now rolling terrain before the Peaks began and boy did they end the last in fact uphill finish of this year's race downhill down and out I'm afraid for Jay Vine the leader of the king of the mountains competition tangling with mads Patterson Carlos Rodriguez kentin Pasha and others jvine the worst affected and away he went so did the break 43 riders in total including names like Richard karapas Tebow Pino Mark Solaire Hugh carthy and the rest well it was too big a temptation for Xiao Armada he set off from the red jersey group when the margin was over five minutes determined to be part of the day and maybe do what rigabortal Iran had done and move up in the overall standings kukarthy detonated the Breakaway Armada still determined but equally so was the red jersey Group which was also thinning down the fighting force was formed up front higuita Kathy and Pino while carapaz also wanted to be part of proceedings and when we finally established six Riders up front that's where our Focus lie for the stage win karapas was looking for more Mountains points in that competition which he now led in the absence of Jay Vine meanwhile Xiao Armada having had teammates Solaire and evil Oliveira up ahead they were dropping out of the front group to help him Bridge well the alarm Bells were going off the likes of Miguel anger Lopez for team Astana they were looking to close the margin on Almeida and in so during the Breakaway started to lose its advantage Rob hessing pushed on in the company of Ali shazbear from Team RKO samsik that was from the break pushing on out of the group of GC favorites Remco Avenue tired of sustaining constant attacks decided to do so himself well Evan apollon and Rick Mass were to be major players in the day and they started to bridge to those who were out ahead of them the gaps were starting to Tumble a user down 56 seconds off the pace also struggling with Carlos Rodriguez had been in the morning's crash but Rob hessing struck out alone would it be the killer blue well the Gap was marginal there was Rodriguez cut and Well unbowed for now we hope he races on hessing pushed on looking for that elusive Victory always in the service of others one of the main men for Primus roglich in the mountains he had to try and grind down that final Peak but in the end he was to be caught with just 200 meters to go the battle between Eva Nepal and mass raged to the line in the end stage win was just too much Temptation right overall leader Evan Paul came through to deny hessing and indeed a big mess finding a gap and indeed bonus seconds ever Nepal underscoring his greatness in this race what a way to do it everyone finishing in the wake of the leader and waking up to the reality that he looks in control of this race Brave work by Richard karapas guiding Carlos Rodriguez to the line ever DePaul himself has taken tumbles in this race but now his second stage win and his first Upper Mountain Top that was incredible there were the margins at the end of the day and some great names rounding out that top 10 and all credit to Almeida who gave it his best shot ever the pole leads overall by a margin of now two minutes and seven seconds our enemy Mass a user in third Mega langolo post fourth Rodriguez in fifth Almeida still in sixth place head of ausman Beno Connor uran and hindley King of the mountains top of the hill or at least some of them today Richard karapas didn't want to celebrate too much in the absence of Jay Vine who of course had crashed out and a modest margin of just 20 points this is a competition that's still alive as we go on towards Madrid in fact all jerseys are and you know that anything can happen so what about tomorrow the run to Talavera it's a double test a looping stage with the same Mountain taken twice a downhill run for home Breakaway GC who knows the only way to find out is of course to join us we'll see that
